module.name: phone
module.description: A smartphone device mockup (rounded frame + notch) framing its body — usually an app screenshot.
module.aiSpec:
Frame content in a SMARTPHONE mockup (rounded bezel + notch) — for app screenshots and mobile UI. Use this for a phone frame; for a desktop/browser frame use @browser and for a plain image use standard Markdown. Block module: the BODY is the screen contents, usually a single ![](@alias) screenshot, but any Markdown works. Keep the image tall (portrait). Pairs well with @multicolumn to show a phone beside explanatory text. Parameters: • color — bezel/frame color (default #111827, near-black). • notch — show the top notch (true/false, default true). • width — max frame width in px, 120-600 (default 240). • screen — screen background color behind the content (default #fff). • shadow — drop shadow under the device (true/false, default true).
<!-- @phone color: #1f2937, width: 260 --> ![app](@app-screen) <!-- @end -->

param.name: notch
param.label: Show notch
param.desc: Show the notch at the top of the frame.

param.name: width
param.label: Frame width (px)
param.desc: Maximum width of the device frame, in pixels.

param.name: screen
param.label: Screen background
param.desc: Background color shown behind the screen content.

param.name: shadow
param.label: Drop shadow
param.desc: Show the drop shadow under the device.

snippet.label: Phone mockup
snippet.description: A smartphone frame around a (portrait) screenshot or content.
